name: Communication from an Insecure Port
notes: This rule detects API unauthenticated accesses. The insecure port is disabled by default from Kubernetes v.1.14, but it's possible to enable it explicitly (insecure-port flag in the policy) and enable communications on port 10250 or 2379 or 8080. Once the insecure port is enabled, full access to the API without authentication is granted.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers
when the event matches Username is any of system:unsecured
TD_list: APPLY Communication from an Insecure Port on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers
AND when the event matches Username is any of system:unsecured
RED_list: Event name: Communication from an Insure Port
Event description: Detects communication from an Insecure Port.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
